perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a dark night sky showing moving green lights of an aurora borealis; a silhouette of a person is briefly visible. (2) Two people, a man in a tan vest and a green beanie and a woman in a denim jacket, appear in a well-lit night scene pointing excitedly at the sky. (3) A series of scenes shows various angles and colors of the aurora (green, pink, purple) over a landscape with small buildings and stars. (4) The male creator is shown speaking directly into the camera with expressive hand gestures. (5) A montage displays still and moving images of the couple enjoying the aurora, including a shot from inside a transparent dome tent.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Wind noise is prominent, with a male and a female voice speaking in an excited, high-pitched tone; no music is audible. (2) An upbeat, medium-tempo pop music track begins as the male voice speaks enthusiastically. (3) The male voice sings a brief melodic line, while the upbeat music continues in the background. (4) The audio transitions to a slow, sentimental piano and string instrumental piece, and all vocal dialogue stops for the rest of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: "真的成功追到極光!!!" (Successfully caught the aurora!!!) in yellow with a black outline, conveying a triumphant tone. (2) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the first half translating dialogue like "上面有沒有綠綠的" (Is there green on top?) and "雖然等級是大概二、三這樣而已" (Although the level is only about 2 or 3). (3) Decorative Text: "最後欣賞一下我們的極光美照" (Finally, enjoy our beautiful aurora photos) appearing at the start of the montage with a satisfied tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video moves from an immediate reaction of discovery to a detailed commentary, ending with a sentimental visual montage.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator and 1 female companion are the only people visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The male creator wears a white hoodie, a tan fleece vest, a green beanie, and a white cross-body bag with a small flag sticker. The female wears a light blue denim jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Nighttime rural landscapes in Norway featuring snowy fields, small lit cabins, and a sky dominated by stars and the aurora borealis.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural night light from the sky with artificial fill light on the human subjects.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents the creators' successful attempt to find and see the aurora borealis in Norway. It aims to share the emotional excitement of the moment through live reactions and then provide a visually impressive summary of the experience through a curated montage of the best shots.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product or service is endorsed; the focus is on a personal travel milestone.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator's distinct white cross-body bag and signature energetic vlogging style are present.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The transition in music style perfectly mirrors the shift from the chaos and excitement of catching the aurora to the quiet appreciation of its beauty.
